title: conflicts_with relation (ONT-R-13)
description: USE FOR: RegulationClause conflicts_with RegulationClause; Standard conflicts_with Standard. Establishes that two normative artifacts are mutually inconsistent. Rationale field is mandatory because a conflict claim without explanation is unauditable. Schema version: 0.1.0.

conflict_rationale.description: Mandatory rationale explaining the nature of the conflict — why these two normative sources are inconsistent. ≥20 chars.

severity.description: Optional. Severity / class of the conflict.
